name: Le Latini's Tiramisu
recipeInstructions:
1. Whip the mascarpone cheese until fluffy.
2. Grate the bitter chocolate square.
3. In a shallow bowl, mix together coffee, cognac, and half of the amaretto. Dip each Savoyarde biscuit in the mixture and place them in a 3-liter rectangular baking dish (13 x 9 inch) with the sugar side up. Reserve the leftover espresso mixture.
4. A layer of coffee-dipped biscuits should cover the bottom of the dish.
5. Beat egg whites until stiff; set aside.
6. Beat egg yolks until lemon-colored. Gradually add sugar and continue beating until all sugar is incorporated. Add mascarpone cheese, grated chocolate, and the remaining amaretto. Gently fold in the beaten egg whites.
7. Spoon the mixture over the Savoyarde biscuits.
8. Dip the Amaretto biscuits in the espresso mixture and place them on top of the cheese mixture.
9. Serve chilled. Serves 14.
